title: FinalSMP
description: A Revisited Vanilla+ Modpack centered around exploration for the private FinalSMP server
body:
# FinalSMP

### (RECOMMENDED: 4+ GB of RAM Allocation)

---

Welcome to the FinalSMP! Discover a brand new world with loads of new content that switch things up while staying true to the Vanilla game!

 

In this pack you'll have an overall enhanced experience thanks to a load of clientside mods I personally could not live without, while also not having a chance to ever get bored with all of the new content that comes with beautiful vistas to see with new biomes, new structures to find, loads of weapons and armor to craft, machines to create and blocks to build with!

 

Survive, Explore, Compete, become stronger, get more materials, explore overhauled dimensions and biomes, build vast and powerful machinery and automation with the Create mod. The only limit you'll have in this pack is your very own imagination!

---

Links to all non-Modrinth Mods used in the Modpack:

- Configured - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured
- Croptopia - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia
- Croptopia's Chocolaterie - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopias-chocolaterie-fabric
- Farsight - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farsight-fabric
- Gate of Babylon - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gate-of-babylon
- Goblin Traders - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/goblin-traders
- Origins: Classes - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins-classes
- Shoppy - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shoppy
